source: grade-auditor independent judgment pass over tools/cas_check.py floor (63/63 elements present, 0 not-yet-due, 0 regressions); conjunctive anchor rule applied, lower tier reported on close boundaries

criteria.name: Use-Cases & Anforderungen
criteria.note: 5 Kernfunktionen as UC tables (UC-01/03/04/06/09) with Actor+Trigger+Outcome+Realises FR, stakeholder table, FR table (docs/arc42/01-introduction-goals.md). Widerspruchsfrei; diagram footnote statuses now match catalogue.

criteria.name: NfA nach SMART
criteria.note: 6 NfA each with Target value + Measurement method + Measured + governing ADR (10-quality-requirements.md), e.g. NfA-4 p95<200ms, measured 15.8ms, ADR-002/006.

criteria.name: Vision
criteria.note: Problemstellung + Vision (Zielgruppe/Abgrenzung) + dedicated 'AI value per core function' giving one KI-Nutzen sentence per Kernfunktion.

criteria.name: Architektur bild+text
criteria.note: C4 L1/L2 SVGs consistent with text; style named + ADR-backed (04-solution-strategy -> ADR-001/002/003); roter Faden Problem->Loesung->Fazit holds. No bild/text contradiction this run.

criteria.name: Perspektiven
criteria.note: Structure (C4 component view, §5), behaviour (runtime scenarios §6), interaction (OpenAPI/response_model routes §8, MCP tool contracts) each with diagram + text.

criteria.name: Datenmodell
criteria.note: ER model §5 + db/schema.sql + forward-only migrations; pgvector vector(1024) storage documented (ADR-006).

criteria.name: Code-Struktur
criteria.note: Clean layer/module split, speaking names, boundaries consistent with design. Held 1 short: in-report proof of 'Dokumentation an nicht-trivialen Stellen' is asserted, not shown with a code excerpt.

criteria.name: Framework-Konzepte
criteria.note: Idiomatic FastAPI: DI via get_settings() frozen Settings, env-only 12-factor config, response_model validation, OpenAPI auto-gen, dimension-guard 501 error handling; framework choice justified (ADR-001).

criteria.name: Erkenntnisse
criteria.note: LEARNINGS.md: 14 dated entries, each with PR# + merge SHA and explicit accepted/corrected/rejected disposition where AI was involved.

criteria.name: Git-Repository
criteria.note: Repo complete; public-readiness sweep done (secret scan 142 commits, MIT LICENSE, PR #17); URL in report at submission.

criteria.name: Abnahmekriterien
criteria.note: §10 acceptance table: one Given/When/Then per UC against a concrete observable, with a final 'Verifies (NfA)' column cross-referencing NfA-1..NfA-6 (crit-2 link). Design-scope rows honestly marked.

criteria.name: Teststrategie
criteria.note: §13 names levels+tools+rationale and has a 'Tests of the AI components' section: guardrail (boundary AST), gap-gate, fill-reuse (non-deterministic output), schema fail-closed, named as such.

criteria.name: Unit-Tests
criteria.note: §10 quotes '295 tests pass, 4 skipped'; error cases enumerated concretely (validator/mapper fail-closed, double-freeze raises). Green in build.

criteria.name: Test-Ergebnisse
criteria.note: §10 quotes pipeline output verbatim ('ingestion: 167 passed, 3 skipped') THEN interprets it; explicitly states screenshot only illustrates and 'the quoted text is the evidence'. Exactly the 3-pt anchor.

criteria.name: KI-Werkzeuge
criteria.note: ai-tools.md excellent: phases Generation/Review/Refactoring/Research each evidenced with prompts+diffs+PR/SHA. BUT Declaration of Authorship is a self-declared placeholder ('not yet his words... awaiting signature'). 12-pt anchor requires Eigenstaendigkeit vollstaendig; conjunctive -> drops to 7.

criteria.name: KI-Services
criteria.note: Two substantial AI roles: fill-only ai_map seam (schema-constrained, ADR-005) + pgvector e5 embedding search (UC-06); guardrails enforced (boundary AST, guard_frozen); HITL review form.

criteria.name: Container-Sub-Systeme
criteria.note: docs/evidence/2026-06-13-distribution.md quotes verbatim Compose up + CI image builds + k3d/Helm deploy; boundaries consistent with §5/§7; style justified (ADR-002/009).

criteria.name: Fazit
criteria.note: fazit.md: three concrete evidenced veto decisions (freeze line PR#2, plan+merge gates PR#4, final acceptance) + 'Honest limits' + transfer rule ('match mode to blast radius'). Substantial, not generic.

gaps.what: Declaration of Authorship is a self-declared placeholder ('this section is a visible placeholder... not yet his words... Awaiting the owner's final text and signature'). The 12-pt anchor requires the Eigenstaendigkeitserklaerung vollstaendig; conjunctive rule caps the tier at 7 until the owner writes the standard FFHS wording and signs. Owner-only action (Veto 3).
In-report evidence for 'Dokumentation an nicht-trivialen Stellen' is asserted, not shown. One quoted docstring/module-header excerpt would secure the 7-pt tier.

Watch only (no deduction this run): prior same-day note flagged a UC-05 diagram-vs-catalogue contradiction; this run found them consistent (SVG footnote scopes only UC-02/UC-09, both matching the table; UC-05 'live' in both). Re-verify after any diagram regeneration since the render is cached by existence.

top_actions: Finalise and sign the Declaration of Authorship (crit 15, +5): replace the placeholder with the standard FFHS Eigenstaendigkeitserklaerung wording and sign. Owner-only by design (Veto 3); single largest movable gap, lowest effort.
Add one quoted documentation excerpt to the code-structure narrative (crit 7, +1): show a representative docstring/module header so 'documented' becomes evidence rather than assertion.

Lock diagram-vs-text consistency before the PDF build (crit 4/5 insurance): clear build/pdf/img/use-cases.pdf and re-render after any diagram edit, then spot-check every status footnote against the catalogue at pre-flight.
honesty_note: Estimate only, not the grader. Test/pipeline figures (295 passed, coverage 90-97%, p95 15.8ms) taken at face value from the report; not re-run this session. The crit-15 tier boundary is the one place a generous reading could restore 5 points and a strict reading confirms the deduction.
